description: Create a Talon capture system for CSS colors in the directory C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\css_colors\. The system must include a list file named css_colors.talon-list defining user.css_color with at least 12 hex mappings, a Python file css_colors.py that implements a capture for that list using @mod.capture(rule="{user.css_color}"), and a Talon file css_colors.talon defining voice commands to both insert the hex code and copy it to the clipboard using the <user.css_color> capture.
